series_metadata.series_description: Files from Manufactured Home Parks and recreational facilities e.g. public pools/spas, campgrounds, marinas; the files may contain any of all of the following: operator and facility identification and address, facility plans/blueprints, design criteria,

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain for the life of the facility, then dispose ; Paper: Retain in office 2 years after completion of construction project, then destroy, provided that the paper records have been copied to microfilm, Microform: Wastepaper ; Paper: Wastepaper
